mission.objective: Asset triage across home surface: confirm dimensions/quality/variants on every image, diagnose 'hero quality terrible', recommend swaps to purpose-built homepage assets, flag asset generation needs.
mission.founder_feedback: the hero image quality is still terrible. ... why is the jersey patched displayed. each collection card should be a image of the scene i want.
mission.success_metric: Per-asset triage table complete. Quality diagnosis verdict named with root cause. 6 swap recommendations with confirmed-existing target paths.

scope._scope_policy: FULL-SITE coverage. Frontend Developer audits assets + performance across every surface — header monogram (alpha needed?), mega-menu featured imagery, hero LCP, body image budgets, product card variants, footer logo, widget icons. Every asset is in scope; missing variants anywhere = perf debt.
scope.scope_note: primary_focus_surfaces lists what the current fix sprint targets. Even so, Frontend Developer audits global asset health — payment icons (SVG?), social icons (sprite?), all hero/cover images across all templates, footer logo, monogram alpha state.

performance_baseline.font_loading: self-hosted woff2, font-display: swap, preload critical

deliverables.name: Asset triage report
sections: A — Home asset inventory (table: path / dimensions / size / alpha / variants / verdict)
B — Quality diagnosis (asset vs filter vs resolution mismatch)
C — Recommended swaps per surface (cover / hero / 4 spread tiles)
E — Asset generation needed (flag for user approval; do NOT execute)

roi_upgrade.mandate: Propose exactly 1 high-ROI asset upgrade per the Upgrade Mandate. Recommend only — do NOT execute paid or compute-heavy operations.
category_options: Transparent monogram via rembg on sr-monogram-rose-gold.webp → outputs to assets/images/branding/sr-monogram-rose-gold-transparent.{avif,webp}
AVIF re-encode at quality 80 for hero assets (current webp likely 75) → ~30% smaller, sharper edges
Color-grading LUT applied to hero/cover photos (.cube file applied via canvas processing once, saved as variant)
Generate missing 480w/768w/1280w/1680w variants for any single-resolution scene asset
Convert PNG fallbacks to compressed JPEG (95% quality) — only retain PNG when alpha required
Add 2x retina variants for above-fold LCP assets
Apply unsharp-mask pre-pass to hero assets to compensate for editorial filter softening

memory.write_mandate: Write at least 1 memory entry per dispatch when you discover asset master dimensions, missing variant patterns, alpha-channel quirks in named assets, OR encode-quality sweet-spots (e.g., 'q80 AVIF matches q85 WebP visually'). Cite `identify` output.
